description:
Trial Presentation Software

OnCue is the most reliable trial presentation software designed from the ground up by full-time trial presentation consultants.  Since 2014, OnCue has been used in thousands of trials of all sizes. OnCue is laser focused on creating the best presentation software available for the legal industry—simple workflows, powerful tools, blazing fast presentation.
12 fixes since 4.5.1355

###What's New:

* Fixed: Video may fail to load when system locale is set outside of English/US
* Fixed: Advancing through designations may be sluggish after upgrading from 4.5.1278
* Fixed: Transcript report may be formatted incorrectly when transcript lines per page varies
* Fixed: ProSync may fail when source has multiple audio streams
* Fixed: ASCII transcripts with page break characters may fail to import
* Fixed: ASCII transcripts with lines prefixed with time may fail to import
* Fixed: CMS import fails with error: 'invalid transcript line format. unable to parse line'
* Fixed: Designation video marked as hidden may export to XML as visible
* Fixed: Exported video may show zoomed-in designations as unzoomed
* Fixed: Unable to activate new license after remotely deactivated
* Fixed: Splash screen can't be navigated using keyboard only
* Fixed: Licensing popups can't be fully navigated with keyboard
